chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 12 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.149/2024 (S/A) 02.02.2024 Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Statements have been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3. Mr. Faiz Ali, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Shoaib Niaz Khaskheli, Advocate for applicant, has filed a statement along with a Photostat copy of FIR, stating that he does not press instant application as the FIR against the applicant has already been registered. In view of above, this miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
